title: Collapse/expand functionality for replies to updates
excerpt:

posts.author: rseweryniak (Rachel Seweryniak)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Currently, reply threads on item updates within boards cannot be collapsed. As discussions within a single update grow, the replies can visually dominate the space, making it difficult to distinguish between individual updates.

I propose adding a collapse/expand functionality for replies to updates. This enhancement would:

  • Improve readability by allowing users to focus on the main updates.
  • Streamline navigation within lengthy threads.
  • Maintain a cleaner, more organized view of item updates.

This functionality would provide a more efficient and user-friendly experience when managing and reviewing updates on boards.

What are you trying to achieve

Adding a collapse/expand functionality for replies to updates

posts.author: mr_guerci (Dennis Guercilena)
posts.cookedHtml: Please monday.com listen to this user.All chats have this feature
